narrative:
Harpersfield Twp township has 1,950 registered voters, with 51.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
